name: Fergy's Mustard/Vinegar BBQ Sauce
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons Louisiana hot sauce (such as Pete's Texas Chili)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl or jar, combine the cider vinegar and yellow prepared mustard.
2. Add the black pepper, Worcestershire sauce, brown sugar, Louisiana hot sauce, and sea salt to the mixture.
3. Stir until all ingredients are well combined.
4. Transfer the sauce to a clean jar or squirt bottle.
5. Store in the refrigerator. The flavor will improve as it ages.
